description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy shaped like a bear, featuring a deep blue, textured fabric with a knitted or woven appearance. The bear has a round head with two small, rounded ears, black button-like eyes, and a small black nose. Its body is plump with outstretched arms and legs, and it has a large, light green patch stitched onto its belly, adorned with brown spots and visible green thread. The back of the bear displays another patch, this one heart-shaped and light green, also stitched on with visible thread. The overall look is whimsical and slightly worn, suggesting it is a well-loved toy, possibly found in a park or on a city sidewalk.
description: A blue, textured stuffed bear with green stitched patches on its belly and back, black button eyes, and a whimsical, slightly worn appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bear's face, black button eyes, nose, and a large green patch with brown spots stitched onto its belly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the bear's profile, rounded snout, and the thickness of its limbs and body.
description_view_2: Back view reveals a heart-shaped green patch stitched onto the lower back and the rounded shape of the head and ears.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the bear's profile and the edge of the belly and back patches.
attribute_facial_expression: The bear has a neutral facial expression with round, black button eyes and a small, simple black nose. There is no visible mouth, giving it a calm and expressionless appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with arms slightly outstretched and legs spread apart, head facing forward.
